export class ChatBubbleShopParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();const items=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const price=wrapper.readInt();const owned=wrapper.readBoolean();const equipped=wrapper.readBoolean();items.push({id,price,owned,equipped});}this._items=items;// Notify UI (SettingsView / Shop UI) immediately
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('chat_bubble_shop',{detail:this._items}));return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
